// Initial code generated by wogen. It is OK to modify with care2
{{- $SRVNAME := print .NAME "srv" }} 
{{- $SRVI := ToUpper $SRVNAME}}
{{- $NS := .NS }} 
{{- $APINAME := .APINAME}}
{{- $CLTNAME := print .NAME "clt" }}
{{- $CLTI := ToUpper $CLTNAME}}
package {{.NAME}}tests

import (
	"log"
	"os"
	"testing"

	"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert"
	"github.com/stretchr/testify/require"
	{{.APINAME}} "{{.BASE}}/{{.APINAME}}"
	{{$CLTNAME}} "{{.BASE}}/{{$CLTNAME}}"
	{{$SRVNAME}} "{{.BASE}}/{{$SRVNAME}}"
	"github.com/workoak/wo/wopclient/wo"
	wopcore "github.com/workoak/wo/wopcore/core"
	_ "github.com/workoak/wo/wopcore/woconnectors/wonats"
)

func Test{{$SRVI}}All(t *testing.T) {
	wopurl := os.Getenv("WOP_TEST_NODE")
	if wopurl == "" {
		wopurl = "nats://localhost:4222"
	}

	//SRV starter
	_, err := runSRV(wopurl)
	require.NoError(t, err, "runSRV expecting no error, got: %v", err)
	//CLT,
	//woclient

	client, err := wo.New(wopurl)
	require.NoError(t, err, "expecting no error")
	pong, err := client.Ping()
	require.NoError(t, err, "ping failed")
	assert.Equal(t, "PONG", pong)
	clt, err := {{$CLTNAME}}.NewCLT(client, nil)
	require.NoError(t, err, "expecting no erros")
	pong, err = clt.PingSRV()
	require.NoError(t, err, "PingSRV: expecting no error")
	assert.Equal(t, "PONG", pong)
	//Run every CMD through the CLT
	testCmds(t,clt)


}

func testCmds(t *testing.T, clt {{$CLTNAME}}.{{$CLTI}}) {
{{range .CMDS }} 
	checkCMD{{.name}}(t,clt) 
{{- end }}
}

func runSRV(wopurl string) ({{$SRVNAME}}.{{$SRVI}}, error) {
	woconn, err := wopcore.Dial(wopurl)

	if err != nil {
		log.Fatalf("WOConn failed: %v", err)
		return nil, err
	}
	config := make(map[string]interface{})

	//
	srv, err := wodb2srv.NewSRV(woconn, config)
	if err != nil {
		log.Fatalf("NewSRV failed: %v", err)
		return nil, err
	}
	return srv, nil

}

{{range .CMDS }} 
func checkCMD{{.name}}(t *testing.T, clt {{$CLTNAME}}.{{$CLTI}}) {
	t.Helper()
	res, err := clt.Run{{.name}}(&{{$APINAME}}.{{.name}}{})
	assert.NoError(t, err, "Run{{.name}} should not return error: %v", err)
	assert.NotEmpty(t, res, "Run{{.name}} should not return empty result")
}
{{- end }}
